description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on push and pull requests to specific paths. The workflow consists of three jobs: cache-sources, build-guix, and bundle-logs. The cache-sources job caches the depends sources on an ubuntu-24.04 runner. The build-guix job uses a matrix strategy to build Guix for multiple targets, installing dependencies, and uploading build artifacts. The bundle-logs job downloads artifacts, prints hashes, and uploads logs.
